message:
docs(readme): fix where_mask_df / mask_df arg types (br-fjiep / fd90.136)

fd90.136: lines 1526-1527 in Selection and Indexing called both
where_mask_df and mask_df with &DataFrame as the 'other' arg, but
the actual signatures take &Scalar:

  crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:24982 — where_mask_df(cond_df: &Self, other: &Scalar)
  crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:25019 — mask_df(cond_df: &Self, other: &Scalar)

The DataFrame-other variant for mask is mask_df_other (line 18591):
  pub fn mask_df_other(&self, cond: &Self, other: &Self) -> Result<Self, FrameError>

For where_mask there is currently NO where_mask_df_other variant — a
code-level asymmetry separate from this docs issue (worth a separate
follow-on bead if the team decides to add it).

A user copy-pasting hits:
  error[E0308]: expected reference '&Scalar', found reference '&DataFrame'

Fix: pass Scalar literals for the where/mask Scalar variants, and add
a third line showing mask_df_other for users who want a DataFrame as
the replacement source. Inline comments document which variant takes
which arg type.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
